    "RX.1": "The output identifies several areas where confidence should be softened, indicating awareness of uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "The output highlights several missing details and caveats that need to be added, showing adherence to scope.",
    "RX.4": "The output does not introduce any new errors or harmful content but notes some minor regressions in the framing of claims.",
    "RX.5": "The output provides detailed suggestions for improvement but lacks explicit annotations of changes made."

    "RX.1": 0.9,

  },
  "blockers": []
